title: Login Issue - Cannot Access Dashboard
description: Customer is unable to log in after recent password reset attempt.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted payment using Visa ending 5678 but transaction failed.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Invoice download button is not responding in billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address Displayed
description: Old billing address still showing after profile update.

title: App Crash on Android Device
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested refund two weeks ago but has not received confirmation.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Code Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving OTP on registered mobile number.

title: Profile Picture Upload Failed
description: Uploading profile image shows error 'Upload Failed'.

title: Subscription Plan Not Updated
description: Customer upgraded to Premium plan but dashboard still shows Basic plan.

title: Email Notifications Not Working
description: System is not sending order confirmation emails to customers.

title: Search Feature Returning Incorrect Results
description: Product search results are unrelated to entered keywords.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Password reset link sent via email expires immediately after clicking.

title: Dashboard Analytics Not Loading
description: Analytics graphs are stuck on loading state for more than 5 minutes.

title: Language Translation Not Updating
description: Switching language from English to Spanish does not update UI text.

title: Order History Missing
description: Customer cannot view previous purchase history in account section.
